meta.title: Iroha Japanese Language School
meta.description: Iroha Japanese Language School in Fukuoka offers Japanese courses for international students. Learn Japanese in a friendly and professional environment.

home.form_error: We're sorry, but something went wrong
home.hero_1: Let's learn Japanese in an optimal learning environment.
home.hero_2: Students representing a wide range of countries
home.badge_1_text:
We have been accepting international students from over 30 countries and regions, including those
throughout Asia.
home.badge_2_text:
Classes are kept small with a maximum of 20 students per class. The homeroom teacher confirms each
student's understanding as the lesson progresses.
home.badge_3_text:
If you choose "Iroha Japanese Language School," which is certified as a "Proper School" (適正校) by the
Immigration Bureau, the procedures for obtaining the necessary residence status for studying abroad
will be smoother and require fewer documents.
home.badge_4_text:
Our curriculum focuses on improving your scores by strengthening your knowledge of Japanese and
general subjects through repeated practice using past exam questions.
home.badge_5_text:
The instructors, who have built a solid career as Japanese language teachers, conduct enjoyable and
engaging lessons. Not only do they study how to teach Japanese, but they also continuously learn to
understand the diverse backgrounds of their students.
home.badge_6_text: BBQ, Cultural Experiences, Excursion, Field Trip
home.service_1_text:
We provide students who wish to pursue higher education with abundant information and experience to
help them find the best path forward. We offer personalized guidance for every step of the process,
including consultations on academic advancement, preparation of application documents, essay
guidance, and interview preparation.
home.service_2_text:
Iroha Japanese Language School is located less than a 5-minute walk from JR Hakata Station, the
gateway to Kyushu. This prime location offers the perfect environment for international students to
find part-time jobs and engage in cultural exchange.
home.service_3_title: Comprehensive Support for Learning and Daily Life
home.service_3_text:
Our dedicated team provides support for your visa and admission procedures, and helps you with any issues in your daily life. We offer assistance in seven languages, including English, Chinese, and Vietnamese.

School Self-Inspection and Evaluation Report
home.testimonial_1:
"I came to Iroha Japanese School to immerse myself in Japanese life. While I find
the grammar instruction quite fast-paced, the teachers are consistently kind and helpful in ensuring my
understanding. I've found that the school offers a great opportunity to learn Japanese thoroughly and
connect with students from diverse backgrounds."
home.testimonial_2:
"Enrolling in IROHA Japanese Language School to prepare for university entrance
exams offered many benefits. Beyond the dedicated teachers and international friendships, the broadened
perspective was invaluable for my personal growth."
home.testimonial_3:
"I'm very glad I chose IROHA Japanese Language School. The dedicated and friendly
teachers make the lessons engaging, and the diverse student body has allowed me to make friends from all
over the world. Their guidance was instrumental in helping me quickly decide on my path to higher
education."
home.testimonial_4:
"Surrounded by classmates from around the world, I've made countless memories.
The teachers' exceptional support has been instrumental in making my current studies both enjoyable and
fulfilling."
home.testimonial_5:
"From the moment I walked through the doors in April 2022, I've been on a
whirlwind journey of learning and growth. However, with challenging tests and practices, being supported
by wonderful teachers and classmates, now I can speak Japanese with confidence. Besides, locating near
Hakata Station made everything convenient. To all my teachers and classmates, thank you for giving me
this unforgettable experience. Arigatou gozaimasu! With warm regards."
home.testimonial_6:
"Enrolling at Iroha Japanese Language School allowed me to make many friends,
improve my Japanese language skills, and achieve my dream of entering university. I am very grateful for
the teachers' support."
home.spring_item_3: The First Exam of EJU (The Examination for Japanese University Admission for International Students)

home.winter_item_6:
Outdoor activities are planned with events such as BBQ, cultural experiences, but they vary from
year to year.

Station nearby: JR Hakata Station
(3minutes walk)
admission.entrance_block:
Entrance Requirements
1. Foreign nationality and 18 years old at least at the time of application.
2. Completed an education equivalent to 12-year education system in Japan.
3. Eagerness to learn Japanese and health condition suitable for study.

Application Process
Admission consultation → Interview → Interview result → Document inspection → Submission of Application for Certificate of Eligibility (COE) to Immigration Office → COE result announcement → School fee payment → Visa processing → Arrival

Required Documents
All documents are valid for only 3 months from the date of issuance.
admission.docd_4: Original Certificate of Relationship with financial sponsor
admission.docd_8: Copy of Applicant's Passport or Identity Card
admission.docd_12: Original Certificate of Employment of applicant if any
admission.docd_18: Original Certificate of Enrollment or Certificate of Temporary Absence
admission.docd_20:
Original Certificate of Employment of financial sponsor and copy of Business
Registration Certificate if any
admission.docd_24: Original Certificate of Income and Tax payment of financial sponsor
admission.docd_26: Original Certificate of Japanese Language Study equivalent to JLPT N5
admission.docd_28: Original Certificate of Bank Balance of financial sponsor

admission.st_requirements:
Entrance Requirements
Short term visa, Dependent visa, Working holiday visa holder
Application Period
admission.st_intake_text:
There are basic classes for April, July, October intake. But for January
intake, applicants are required to have at least N4 level in Japanese language. However, this is based
on the capacity per intake every year. Please contact us in advance.
admission.st_abroad_text:
Document submission → Document inspection → School fee payment → Admission
Certificate issuance → Arrival
admission.st_japan_text:
Admission consultation → Level Check → Class observation → School fee
payment → Entrance
admission.st_docs:
Required Documents
1. Application Form （School's form）
2. Pledge（School's form）
3. Copy of Passport + Copy of Residence Card （if any）
